---
name: Feature Request / 新功能建议
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 提出扩展新功能的想法和建议
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe / 你的需求是否与当前问题有关？**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Describe the solution you'd like / 描述你期望的解决方案**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered / 你考虑过的替代方案**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context / 其他信息**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
